feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Returned Quantity Field Does Not Allow Decimal Values in Perform Maintenance Job App in FIORI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please I have a question, In the Fiori app Perform Maintenance Job, the dialog Return Goods does not allow the entry of decimal values in the Returned Quantity field when returning components from a maintenance order.

The input field only accepts integer values, even for materials whose unit of measure supports decimal quantities.

 

 

Please someone have any solution?

Thank you,

Regards

entry.title: Situation Handling for Maintenance Order – Trigger Notification at Post-Execution Phase in SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am working with Situation Handling in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Asset Management / EAM) and have a requirement to notify Production users when a maintenance order reaches the post-execution stage (i.e., maintenance work is completed and production can resume).

I explored the standard situation type
EAM_MAINT_ORDER_PHASE_CHANGED (Maintenance Order Phase Changed).

However, while configuring the conditions / anchor object filters, I noticed that:

  • Order Phase (Execution / Post-Execution) is not available as a condition

  • System Status (CNF / TECO) is also not available as a filter

  • Only header attributes such as Plant, Order Type, Equipment, Dates, etc. are exposed

In contrast, for Maintenance Notifications, phase and subphase are available as conditions, making it easier to trigger notifications.

My questions are:

  1. How can we trigger a situation notification specifically when a maintenance order enters the post-execution stage in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

  2. Is there any standard workaround or recommended approach to achieve this using Situation Handling?

  3. Is this a known limitation by design for maintenance orders in Public Cloud?

The goal is purely to inform Production users (via Fiori notification or email) that the maintenance activity is completed and they can resume operations — without using custom developments, as this is a Public Cloud system.

Any guidance, best practices, or confirmation from SAP experts would be greatly appreciated.


Regards,
Sriram R

entry.title: How do i skip the "preparation" phase in an S/4hana phase based maintenance order?
entry.content:
Hello,

Iam trying to skip the "preparation" phase after releasing a proactive phase based maintenance order. I found an article that says you have to use events to skip the preparation phase automatically, but this doesn’t work for me. I have configured the following:

Overall status "R055" is "preparation". 

I have 100% selected the right profile and connect it to the right order type (proactive maintenance). 

Iam using this tile:

However once i create a maintenance order with the type "proactive maintenance" and release the order, it goes to the "preparation" phase instead of skipping it.

 

Am i missing something?

entry.title: Configuration steps to deactivate MRS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently having MRS configuration but we are not scheduling work orders through MRS. Can you please let me know steps to deactivate MRS configuration. And by doing this will it have any impact to RSH.

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Are the PM Fiori apps also applicable for CS?
entry.content:
We want to map the service notification (IW51, etc.) in Fiori and implement the process there.
Are the PM Fiori apps suitable for this, or are there additional CS apps/solutions available?

entry.title: Issue with reservation while using IE4N for equipment installation/dismantling
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm looking to implement IE4N functions for serialized equipment installation/dismantling.

For first tests, everything is working well, but I realized that if a component is initially added to the maintenance order for the parts to be replaced, reservation remains open even when goods issue has been posted to the system through IE4N.

I tested in both ECC 6.0 and S/4 HANA 2020 and I do see the same behavior.

When I do the GI using reservation number in IE4N, it works and reservation is closing. But it is not a process that I want to use because it will be one more step for technicians/planners to get this information.

Is someone already experience that issue? It does not look that IE4N function is widely used so despite my searches, I've not been able to find any relevant information about that issue.

Thanks in advance!

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: Assign operations to a work Center in RSH
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In RSH can we assign operations to a work center instead of individuals or else can RSH pull data by work center . What will be the status of the work order in RSH Planning board? What type of assignment we need to have in SAM for this scenario?

In RSH even if we assign operations to a work center can we still assign technicians during dispatch? Assigning technicians will be an optional step.

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: In SAP preventive maintenance work order basic start date is after final due date
entry.content:
We are facing issue with preventive maintenance work order Basic Start Date and Final due date.

In our work order Basis start date is 02/02/2026 and final due date is 01/31/2026.

We are using 7 day factory calendar in both plant and work center assignment. 

Even though basis start date is getting scheduled as per 5 working days. (31st Jan is Saturdays).

Please help me to understand , why system is not scheduling as per 7 working days. We want to schedule as per 7 working days.

entry.title: Create a new maintenance package in an existing maintenance strategy
entry.content: Can i create a new maintenance package in an existing maintenance strategy without it locking the strategy? The strategy is already being used in maintenance plans. I have tried this in the sandbox, but i am not getting any prompt to reschedule existing plans.

entry.title: Exit or enhancement option for Tasklist Component Assignment
entry.content: We are currently investigating the feasibility of adding custom fields to the Component Assignments subscreen (Screen 3500) within the General Task List operation (Program SAPLCMDI). Preliminary analysis via transaction SMOD and searching for relevant BAdIs has not yielded a standard enhancement option for this specific screen. Could you please confirm if there is a supported SAP standard exit, Business Add-In, or enhancement spot available to facilitate this requirement without modification to the standard object?

entry.title: How to extract and share custom fields from standard table related to order, notification and measur
entry.content: How to extract and share custom fields from standard table related to order, notification and measuring point?

entry.title: Impact of Not Settling a Maintenance Order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would like to ask for your guidance regarding Maintenance Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

If costs or expenses have been posted to a Maintenance Order, but the order is not settled, what would be the impact on the system?

Specifically, if the order is processed up to Technical Completion (TECO), but Settlement and Business Completion (CLSD) are not performed, could this cause any issues or limitations?
For example:

  • Impact on Month-End or Year-End Closing

  • Open balances remaining on the Maintenance Order

  • Effects on Financial Reporting or Controlling

  • Any system checks or errors during period-end activities

I would appreciate any insights or best practices on whether settlement is mandatory before closing periods, and what potential risks may occur if settlement is not completed.

Thank you very much in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Jessada

entry.title: Plan maintenance list export til excel or CSV
entry.content:
Hello Community,

It is required to extract the PM for the 2025 and 2026 including work order implement, delayed or any backlogg. 

which T-code to use, any short and effective ways?

Thanks for your assistance

entry.title: Search help (F4) for the Person Responsible field is not working in IW21
entry.content: Hello everyone, The search help (F4) for the Person Responsible field is not working while creating a notification, even though the relevant HR master data is properly maintained. Could anyone know what might be causing this issue ?

entry.title: How can i use Framework Purchase Order (Blanket Order) in PM Module.
entry.content:
Below is my scenario.

User frequent creates small amount Maintenance orders with external services. They don't prefer to have individual PO's for each Maintenance Order. Since each PO needs approval from the Management. Instead, they want to create one PO (say for 10,000 Rs.) and then link the PM orders to this Framework order. Also, once the Framework PO approved by Management can be changed (due to release strategy).

how to generates purchase orders automatically?release generates PR,Me59N generates PO or other way(generates PO without PR?);

It's this a new PO or a new item for FM order

entry.title: POST Call for UI_MAINTWORKREQUESTOVW_V2 with C_MaintWorkRequestOverviewTP Entity gives Forbidden
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to test POST call for UI_MAINTWORKREQUESTOVW_V2 with C_MaintWorkRequestOverviewTP and to_EventPrio Navigation for Priority creation but its giving Dump and Forbidden error on Gateway client but same works as expected on "Screen Maintenance Request" application.

We are having Maintenance notification created and when we Edit it and tries to add Priorities POST call works and gives created response in Network tab.
Same when I trying on Gateway client its giving Forbidden and Short dump below

Can someone help me to find what exactly I am doing wrong?

Thank you,

Ankita

entry.title: Clarification Needed: Functional Status of MRP Type V1 in ECC/S/4HANA Production
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am seeking clarification regarding the functional status and production usage of MRP Type V1 (Manual Reorder Point Planning with External Requirements) in current SAP ECC and/or S/4HANA environments.

We are evaluating consumption-based planning methods for externally procured operating supplies with the following characteristics:

  • Seasonal demand pattern

  • Primarily, break-in (reactive) maintenance consumption

  • No advance planned independent requirements

  • Variable replenishment lead time (observed 9–17 days)

  • Forecast model currently set to “N”

During internal review, it was suggested that MRP Type V1 may not be fully functional or widely supported in production systems. Since V1 remains selectable in the material master (MRP 1 view), we would like to confirm its current technical status.

Specific questions:

  1. Is MRP Type V1 fully supported and functional in active ECC and S/4HANA production environments?

  2. Are there configuration dependencies (MRP group settings, external requirements inclusion, planning file settings, etc.) that would cause V1 not to trigger as expected?

  3. Has V1 behavior changed in S/4HANA compared to ECC?

  4. Is V1 actively used in production by SAP customers for consumption-based planning?

Our objective is to verify whether V1 is a supported and operational planning method before proceeding with configuration changes.

Any clarification, OSS references, or real-world implementation insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Multiple PR's are getting generated from the Work Order but Collective PR indicator is enabled
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In the Work Order multiple PR's are getting generated for the Non-stock item category 'N' line items. The vendor & material group is also same for all the Non-stock line items. 

The configuration setting “Collective Purchase Requisition Indicator” is already enabled for the relevant plant and order type combination. Despite this, the system is not grouping the PR items and is instead generating separate PRs.

Has anyone faced a similar issue in ECC 6.0 EHP8 and been able to resolve it? Any guidance or pointers  would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Status de sistema cambio en orden de mantenimiento a "Bloquear cerrado técnicamente"
entry.content:
Hola a todos

En ciertas ordenes de mantenimiento se activó el status del sistema "Bloquear cerrado técnicamente", hasta ahora no he podido encontrar que parámetro activo este status el cual no se puede reversar.

  • Los permisos de trabajo están cerrados.
  • No hay reservas de material pendiente.
  • No hay Normas de Liquidación pendientes.
  • El status de usuario está en "Listo para cerrar"

Espero puedan ayudarme con este tema.

entry.title: Asset Performance Management Flows and Architecture
entry.content: Please where do I get process flows and information on the architecture framework for Asset Performance Management?
